source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A process requires a steady 0.75 kg/s supply of compressed air at 500 kPa at a maximum temperature of 30\circ\text{C}. Local ambient conditions are 100 kPa, 20\circ\text{C}. Using a reversible compressor, determine the rate of heat rejection in the aftercooler.
